prompt: Draw a one-bedroom studio apartment of about 42 m². It should have a living/kitchen area, a separate bedroom, and a bathroom. Put a window in the bedroom and a front door.
Lay out a two-bedroom flat with a kitchen/living area, a master bedroom, a second bedroom, a bathroom, and a hall connecting them. Add windows on the exterior walls.
Design a small open-plan office (~100 m²): one large open work area, a meeting room, and a kitchenette. Give each room a door and put windows on the outside walls.
